title: C-series protocol droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''C-series protocol droids''' were [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] produced by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] during the era of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The series was a "boutique model" extension of the [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]].<ref name="NEGTD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> The C-series was comprised of nine models ranging from [[C-1 protocol droid|C-1]] to [[C-9 protocol droid|C-9]].<ref name="TNR">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>

The C-series droids were manufactured on the factory moon of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]]. It was speculated that the C-series was introduced to cash in on the success of the [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]], and in particular the exploits of [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], hero of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. These rumors were officially denied by Cybot Galactica.<ref name="EGTD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>
